title: Hampter
description: Adds the one and only Hampter to Minecraft!
body:
# Hampter

This mod adds the one and only Hampter to Minecraft! Improve your gameplay experience by having Hampter with you at all times! What's that? He doesn't follow you? Yes he does! You just have to get lucky!

## Questions for Hampter
| Question| Answer|
|-----:|-----------|
|     Why?| Why not?|
|     Use on Important World?| No |
|     Use on Test World? | Definitely! |
| How Much Was This Mod Tested? | Not A Lot|


### Enjoy Hampter being on your world!
Just remember, don't attack him... he does have laser eyes...

### Dependencies
Requires **Fabric API** and **GeckoLib3**


# Important Info
**Please Note:** This mod is an April Fools mod. **DO** ***NOT*** USE THIS MOD ON AN IMPORTANT WORLD, as there is no guarantee that this mod is stable.

## Credits
Superkat32 - Creator of the mod.  
Modding by Kaupenjoe - Created an amazing [video tutorial series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKGarocXCE1EeLZggaXPJaARxnAbUD8Y_) that was used in the making of this mod.  
The Original Poster of Hampter - For actually posting the image.
The Original Person Who Voiced The "Hampter" Audio Clip - For voicing the audio clip.
